text: Hey, I'm having trouble with the app. It's crashing whenever I try to open it. I've tried restarting my phone but no luck. Can you help?

I tried logging into my account but it says my password is wrong, even though I just changed it yesterday. My friend said they got into my account by mistake! Can you help me figure this out? It’s really confusing, and I don’t even know if I’m locked out or what.
I can't log into my account anymore. My username is not recognized. Also, I think I might have used a different email, but I'm not sure which one it could be. Can you help me figure this out?
I need to request a refund for my last order. It arrived late and didn't match the description. Thank you.

I am really disappointed with the service. It's like every time I try to get help, there are more questions than answers. And what's up with the website? I've been trying to use it for days but it feels so clunky. Plus, my friend told me they had issues too, but I didn't expect it to be this bad! Anyway, just wanted to voice my frustration. Hope you can do better soon.
I received the wrong item in my order and would like to request a refund, not an exchange. Can you guide me on how to proceed?

I’ve been trying to install the latest update to your software, but despite following all the steps outlined in the user manual, I keep receiving an error message that states, 'Installation failed: Unknown error code 0x80070057.' This has never happened before, and while I am usually able to troubleshoot such issues on my own, this particular problem is quite puzzling. It almost seems like the system is rejecting the update for reasons that are not clear to me. I would appreciate any assistance you can provide to resolve this issue promptly, as it is impacting my workflow significantly.

I can’t believe the service has been this bad lately. I tried to reach out last week about the long wait times, and nobody seemed to care. It’s frustrating because I’ve been a loyal customer for years. Why is there no priority for customers like me? Also, the app keeps crashing when I try to check my orders. Not what I expected at all.
Is there any chance your service will offer multilingual support in the future?
Hi there! I really love your service but I'm wondering if you plan to expand beyond cloud hosting? That would be awesome! I just think some of us need a self-hosted option. Thx!
I am experiencing an issue accessing my account, as I have not received the verification email despite multiple attempts. Please advise on the next steps I should take to resolve this matter.
Hey, so um, I was trying to figure out how to change my address on the account? like, is it in the settings or something? thanks!

Hey, um, so like... I really need to know if the, uh, pro plan is, you know, only billed like once a year or monthly? It's kinda confusing. I can't find it anywhere, or maybe I'm just missing it? Just want to be sure. Thanks!
hey, i can't log into my account? it says my password is incorrect, but i know it’s right. tried reset but nothing comes in my email. can u help me?
My app crashes when I try to upload images. I'm using the latest version and have restarted my phone. Please help.
I'm having trouble accessing my account. I reset my password, but it still won't let me log in. Can you help?
